channel.title: Posts on Deep N Wide
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Deep N Wide

item.title: Moving from Wordpress to Hugo and GitHub
item.description:
Well, I update this blog once in a while - not more than a dozen times in an year. So it is overkill to use a standalone hosting paying INR 4000 for a WP hosting in popular sites. Yeah…they all start with less than INR 100 per month but jumps to INR 300 per month upon renewal. Typical trap for customers…

I hope this will go on well. Let me end this post with an image I generated for some personal projects… :-)
